reviews.comment:
pase una sola vez, es un lugar accesible si estas viajando , tienen para compar comida y baños, ademas de poder cargar combustible, tienen buena atencion. Es recomendable.-

(Translated by Google)
I only went there once. It's an accessible place if you're traveling. They have food and restrooms, and you can fill up with gas. They have good service. I recommend it.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/13471578260485529773/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURLbjZ5WlFnEAE

reviews.comment:
Me encantó la atención de la empleada del bar/kiosco que hizo de guía turística indicándonos caminos, lugares, etc. ( La oficina de turismo estaba cerrada cuando más se la necesita que es feriado o finde)

(Translated by Google)
I loved the attention from the bar/kiosk employee who acted as a tour guide, pointing out paths, places, etc. (The tourist office was closed when it's most needed, which is on holidays or weekends)
